zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale於1243年7月出生在英國艾可萊特爾時，他的父親Sir Robert De Bruce V19歲，母親Isabel de Clare16歲。他於1271年與Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick在蘇格蘭艾斯爾騰恩貝利結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1304年在蘇格蘭度福利爾安南達爾 迪斯特利可特享年61歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭恩布利亞阿比托。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale于1243年7月出生在英国艾可萊特爾时，他的父亲Sir Robert De Bruce V19岁，母亲Isabel de Clare16岁。他于1271年与Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick在苏格兰艾斯爾騰恩貝利结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1304年在苏格兰度福利爾安南達爾 迪斯特利可特享年61岁，埋葬在英国英格兰恩布利亞阿比托。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Brus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Polish, Slovenian, Czech, Sorbian, and Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): from Slavic brus ‘whetstone’, presumably a metonymic occupational name for someone who honed or sharpened blades; possibly also a nickname for a clumsy or coarse fellow. Compare Bruss .
Slovenian: from an old dialect short form of the personal name Ambrož (see Ambrose ). Compare Bruss .
French: topographic name for someone living on a heath, from Occitan brusc ‘heather’, or a habitational name from (Le/Les) Brus, the name of several places in southern France.

variants.name: Bruss
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Eldor, Reinhard, Rudie, Wilhelm.
German (also Brüss): from a short form of the medieval personal name Ambrosius (see Ambrose ).
Americanized or Germanized form of Polish, Slovenian, Czech, Sorbian, and Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic)   Brus  , meaning ‘whetstone’ and, as a Slovenian name, also ‘Ambrose’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale was born in July 1243, in Writtle, Essex, England, his father, Sir Robert De Bruce V, was 19 and his mother, Isabel de Clare, was 16. He married Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick in 1271, in Turnberry, Ayrshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 8 daughters. He died in 1304, in Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, at the age of 61, and was buried in Abbeytown, Cumbria, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale est né en juillet 1243, à Writtle, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert De Bruce V, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Clare, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick en 1271, à Turnberry, Ayrshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé en 1304, à Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Abbeytown, Cumbria, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale im Juli 1243 in Writtle, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert De Bruce V 19 und seine Mutter Isabel de Clare 16. Er hat 1271 in Turnberry, Ayrshire, Scotland Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb 1304 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Scotland und wurde in Abbeytown, Cumbria, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale è nato il nel luglio 1243 nel Writtle, Essex, England, il suo padre, Sir Robert De Bruce V, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Isabel de Clare, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick nel 1271, nel Turnberry, Ayrshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 8 figlie. Morì nel 1304, nel Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Abbeytown, Cumbria, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandaleが1243年7月にイギリスエセックスウリットルで生まれた時，父Sir Robert De Bruce Vは19歳，母Isabel de Clareは16歳であった。1271年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアターンバーリーでLady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrickと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1304年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアアナンダル ディストリクトで61歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスクウンブリアアベイトウンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale(이)가 1243년 7월 영국 에세스 리틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert De Bruce V(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel de Clare(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1271년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 터른베리에서 Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1304년 스컷랜드 드프리실르 애난데일 디스트릭트에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 쿠브리아 애브브이타운에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale nasceu em julho de 1243, em Writtle, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert De Bruce V, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Clare, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick em 1271, em Turnberry, Ayrshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1304, em Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Abbeytown, Cumbria, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale родился июль 1243 г. в местности риттл, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert De Bruce V было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Clare, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick в 1271 г. в местности турнбирри, аиршир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 8 дочерей. Он умер в 1304 г. в местности аннандеил дистрикт, думфриессхир, Шотландия в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности эббитоун, кумбря, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale nació en julio de 1243, en Writtle, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert De Bruce V, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Isabel de Clare, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick en 1271, en Turnberry, Ayrshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió en 1304, en Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Abbeytown, Cumbria, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
